normalization.notes: Store Unicode Braille Patterns as authored. Do not fold braille cells to Latin text or treat dot-number metadata as decorative display text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: braille cells, dot-number patterns, spaces, capitalization indicator, number indicator, punctuation cells, and later UEB contractions
segmentation.notes: Visual Unicode braille is only a proxy for a tactile writing system. The v1 packet uses uncontracted English braille cells and records tactile interaction requirements as app gaps.

sources.license: Unicode License reviewed for metadata use
sources.notes: Unicode Braille Patterns metadata for code point inventory and rendering checks.
Unified English Braille rules reference. Do not copy rules or tables into shipped lessons without review.
Braille usage and accessibility guidance for United States contexts.
Useful for checking uncontracted and contracted braille translations. Not a shipped content source.
Short uncontracted braille examples authored by GlyphBridge and checked by braille readers.
